persona.label: Software architect
persona.description: Designs delivery systems and frequently presents technical decisions to engineers and leadership.

persona_lens.starting_surface: Open the product surface first, then inspect the generated artifacts.
persona_lens.first_question: Can I explain the delivery loop to another architect without rerunning the system?
persona_lens.evidence_emphasis: Recorded UI playback, scenario outcomes, review gates, and reproducible commands.
persona_lens.escalation_trigger: A claim without playback or a workflow step that cannot be traced to source artifacts.
persona_lens.finding_bias: Prefer findings that improve reviewability and presentation readiness.

scenarios.label: Explain the delivery loop
scenarios.task: Create a technical presentation showing how Kitsoki turns a request into story execution, evidence, review, and handoff.
success_criteria: The presentation has a clear source run bundle.
The deck links scenario evidence to playback.
The next engineering action is visible.

scenarios.label: Verify UI evidence
scenarios.task: Inspect recorded UI playback and decide whether the evidence is enough for an engineering audience.
success_criteria: The playback is linked from the deck.
Review gates distinguish proof from placeholder evidence.
